_comment: Branch protection for OPS-PRIVATE tier per REPO_STANDARDS.md §2. Tier repos: aidoc-flow-operations, aidoc-flow-business, aidoc-flow-iplanic. Same profile as product-code tier — ai-review + composition is the substantive gate. Private repos have no fork-PR risk.
_apply_note: PR-C2 MUST strip ALL `_`-prefix keys before POST/PUT/PATCH. Use `jq 'del(.._comment, .._apply_note, .._docs, .._endpoint, .._umbrella_note)'` or equivalent. GitHub REST endpoints strictly validate unknown fields.
